name: Aromatic Broth with Vegetable Slivers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut lemon grass into 2-inch pieces; bruise lightly. Combine with stock, cilantro stems, chili, and lime zest in a saucepan. Simmer, covered, for 15 minutes (halfway through, taste and remove hot pepper if desired, or leave in longer for more heat).
2. Strain the broth. (The solids can be re-used with more cilantro to flavor another batch of broth.) Add lime juice, salt, and pepper.
3. Cut snow peas into thin diagonal strips. Shave 2-inch ribbons of carrot using a vegetable peeler. Thinly slice radishes and scallion.
4. Bring the soup to a boil: stir in snow peas and carrots and cook until just tender—about 1 1/2 minutes. Stir in radishes, scallion, and cilantro; bring to a boil. Serve at once.
